name: Botanero

identity.notes: Official Botanero site and its linked Toast vendor identify the same Rockville location; no ambiguous location merged.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Current Bota Menu page lists the standing small-plates catalog and address 800 Pleasant Drive, Ste 160, Rockville, MD 20850.
Officially linked Toast ordering page is for Botanero Restaurant at 800 Pleasant Dr, Ste 160, Rockville and lists current food products and descriptions.
Dated August 2025 brunch PDF; retained only as historical support, not current.
